subcodes.first_line: O Ghulam! Upon thee be the glory of God, the Mighty, the All-Knowing! Thou hast attained unto that which was sent down in the Books of God's presence and hast hearkened [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا غلام علیک بهاء الله العزیز العلام قد فزت بما نزل فی کتب الله حضرت و سمعت و
